titre: Machine Learning Engineer for Digital Manufacturing
stack: AI/ML, PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, LangChain, AWS, MLOps, CI/CD
commentaire: Good match for AI/ML engineering, though it requests 2 years of experience which aligns with the candidate's 1.5 years plus personal AI projects.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Machine Learning Engineer role at GlobalFoundries. Your focus on integrating GenAI and LangChain into manufacturing processes directly matches my experience building autonomous AI agents and automated data pipelines.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. It runs a daily scraper that collects 1,300+ property listings and feeds them into an AI agent that estimates prices from live market data. I also built an automated job search pipeline with n8n, AI agents, and an MCP server. These are systems where AI does the heavy lifting, not just assists.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I am impressed by GlobalFoundries' scale and would like to help move your AI/ML models from development into production environments.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren
